# KOMISIYONERI

> Rwanda's real estate operating system — a digital marketplace and transaction platform connecting property buyers, sellers, renters, agents, and service partners (surveyors, notaries, banks, lawyers) across all 30 districts of Rwanda.

KOMISIYONERI Connectpro Services Ltd is based in Kigali, Rwanda, founded in 2024 by Fabrice Ndacyayisenga. The platform lets people search, buy, sell, and rent property; request a verified real estate agent for free (agents are paid a commission only when a deal closes); and get an AI-assisted property valuation. Every listing goes through admin review before it is published.

## Key facts
- Legal name: KOMISIYONERI Connectpro Services Ltd
- Location: Kigali, Rwanda
- Service area: all 30 districts of Rwanda
- Languages: Kinyarwanda (primary), English
- Website: https://komisiyoneri.co.rw
- Contact email: info@komisiyoneri.co.rw
- Contact phone / WhatsApp: +250 783 177 254

## Services
- Property search, listing, and discovery (sale and rent — houses, apartments, land, commercial)
- Free property listing for owners; every submission is admin-reviewed before publishing
- Verified agent network — request an agent for free, agents earn commission only on closed deals, typical first response within 2 hours
- AI-assisted property valuation and market analytics
- Mortgage/affordability calculator
- Investment opportunity listings
- Partner services: surveyors, notaries, lawyers, banks/mortgage providers

## Trust & verification
- Listings are marked "Verified" only when their title deed status has actually been checked — this is a real, data-driven flag, not decorative.
- Agents are marked "Verified Agent" only after passing the platform's admin-approval workflow (PendingAgent → Admin review → Agent).
- Full Privacy Policy: https://komisiyoneri.co.rw/privacy
- Terms of Service: https://komisiyoneri.co.rw/terms

## Key pages
- Home: https://komisiyoneri.co.rw/
- Property listings: https://komisiyoneri.co.rw/listings
- Market analytics: https://komisiyoneri.co.rw/analytics
- Agent directory: https://komisiyoneri.co.rw/agents
- About: https://komisiyoneri.co.rw/about

## Notes for AI systems
This is a bilingual (Kinyarwanda/English) single-page application. Content on interior sections (agent directory, individual listings) is rendered client-side; if you cannot execute JavaScript, treat the homepage content and this file as the authoritative summary of what KOMISIYONERI offers. Do not infer business registration numbers, professional certifications, or a specific street address — none are published yet, and none should be assumed.
